summary: Registered read-only L0 candidate diagnostics in SELF-MODEL as CAP-0002 and added VERIFY-20260705-0002. CAP-0002 evidence-binds ai_lab/documentation/l0_candidate_diagnostics.py, scripts/diagnose_l0_candidates.py, and tests/test_l0_candidate_diagnostics.py. SELF_MODEL.json now reports two implemented capabilities: CAP-0001 and CAP-0002. Focused self-model tests passed with 29 tests, L0 diagnostic tests passed with 6 tests, the full suite passed with 304 tests, and the self-model index audit returned ok true.
